parameters.name: surftype
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: Determines the primitive used to connect the points.

parameters.name: uniquepoints
parameters.label: Unique Points
parameters.description: Enable not sharing points between primitives.

parameters.name: modifybounds
parameters.label: Modify Bounds
parameters.description: Available only when an input is connected to the to set bounds for the . When Modify Bounds is On the parameters below will further modify the shape of the .

parameters.name: cornerradius
parameters.label: Corner Radius
parameters.description: Set the corner radius for the round corners box.

parameters.name: depth
parameters.label: Subdivisions Depth
parameters.description: Controls the number of subdivision iterations applied to rounded corner boxes. Higher numbers gives a smoother surface.

parameters.name: anchoru
parameters.label: Anchor U
parameters.description: Puts the left side, the middle or the right side at the origin 0.

parameters.name: anchorv
parameters.label: Anchor V
parameters.description: Puts the bottom side, the middle or the top side at the origin 0.

parameters.name: anchorw
parameters.label: Anchor W
parameters.description: Puts the back side, the middle or the front side at the origin 0.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.label: Uniform Scale
parameters.description: Specifies a uniform scale factor in all axes.

parameters.name: normal
parameters.label: Normal
parameters.description: Choose whether to create a normal attribute and the attribute class of the normal attribute.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.label: Texture Coordinates
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the texture coordinates should be created.

parameters.name: extenduv
parameters.label: Extend to Corner
parameters.description: When rounding corners, chooses if texture goes around the rounded part or not.

parameters.name: color
parameters.label: Color
parameters.description: Puts a different color on each point, vertex or primitive, mostly for testing purposes.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.
